name: Bioera S.p.A.
summary: Bioera S.p.A. engages in the production and sale of organic products, natural cosmetics, and traditional food products in Italy. The company markets its products under the KI, Crudigno, and Fonte della Vita brand names. Bioera S.p.A. distributes its products through outsourcers. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Milan, Italy.
